pages.text: Tank armor wants dense or reactor materials: tantalum-tungsten-hafnium, uranium-osmium, hafnium boride, cobalt-chrome, warded shulker lining, and void-tempered coatings.
Magic gear wants resonance: Resonant Cascade, quartz-gold resonant alloy, YAG, ruby/sapphire/peridot arcane alloys, Deorum, Dark Power, Fluxite, and Soul Anchor socket planning through Apotheosis.
